People

People and access

One person profile can belong to many workspaces and selected projects.

Open NetworkOpen Project Hub

Directory

CristianOwner · Private profile · CSorro / Ryan / Hull
Owner

Thumbnail ArtistFreelancer · Network profile · Available
Available

EditorGuest · Project-only access
Guest

DeveloperContractor · Portfolio visible
Available

Invite flow

1. Add personCreate or invite their profile.
2. Choose accessWorkspace-wide or project-only.
3. Set roleOwner, Admin, PM, Editor, Artist, Guest.
4. Optional profilePrivate, team-only, network or public.

Profile visibility

🔒 Private👥 Team only🌐 Network🚀 Public portfolio
